description: You are a stargazing tour guide at the Aoraki Mackenzie International Dark Sky Reserve (44.00° S, 170.47° E) preparing for a tour on March 15, 2024, at 09:00 UTC. Configure the simulation by disabling the atmosphere and ground while enabling constellation lines and labels. Capture screenshots of Crux, the Large Magellanic Cloud, and Alpha Centauri to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Create a tour briefing document at ~/Desktop/tour_briefing.txt containing the tour date, location, and a brief note for each of the three highlight objects explaining their significance.
